mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.period_id, a.student_id, a.honor_type_id, a.honor_name, a.honor_level, a.achieve_time, a.description, a.material_urls, a.bonus_score, a.affect_dimension, a.status, a.apply_time, a.class_reviewer_id, a.class_review_time, a.class_review_comment, a.dept_reviewer_id, a.dept_review_time, a.dept_review_comment, a.school_reviewer_id, a.school_review_time, a.school_review_comment, a.created_at, a.updated_at, s.student_no, u.real_name as student_name, c.id as class_id, c.class_name, d.id as org_unit_id, o.unit_name as department_name, ht.type_name as honor_type_name, ht.category as honor_category, ht.evaluation_dimension as honor_type_level, ep.period_name, ep.period_code, cr.real_name as class_reviewer_name, dr.real_name as dept_reviewer_name, sr.real_name as school_reviewer_name FROM student_honor_application a LEFT JOIN students s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN org_units o ON c.org_unit_id = o.id LEFT JOIN honor_types ht ON a.honor_type_id = ht.id LEFT JOIN evaluation_periods ep ON a.period_id = ep.id LEFT JOIN users cr ON a.class_reviewer_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN users dr ON a.dept_reviewer_id = dr.id LEFT JOIN users sr ON a.school_reviewer_id = sr.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.period_id, a.student_id, a.honor_type_id, a.honor_name, a.honor_level, a.achieve_time, a.description, a.bonus_score, a.affect_dimension, a.status, a.apply_time, s.student_no, u.real_name as student_name, c.id as class_id, c.class_name, d.id as org_unit_id, o.unit_name as department_name, ht.type_name as honor_type_name, ep.period_name FROM student_honor_application a LEFT JOIN students s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN org_units o ON c.org_unit_id = o.id LEFT JOIN honor_types ht ON a.honor_type_id = ht.id LEFT JOIN evaluation_periods ep ON a.period_id = ep.id WHERE a.status = #{targetStatus} AND a.deleted = 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM class_teachers ct WHERE ct.class_id = s.class_id AND ct.user_id = #{reviewerId} AND ct.deleted = 0 )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM department_admins da WHERE da.org_unit_id = c.org_unit_id AND da.user_id = #{reviewerId} AND da.deleted = 0 )
ORDER BY a.apply_time ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as class_approved, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as class_rejected, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as dept_approved, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as dept_rejected, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as school_approved, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as school_rejected, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withdrawn FROM student_honor_application WHERE period_id = #{periodId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.honor_type_id, a.honor_name, a.honor_level, a.bonus_score, a.affect_dimension, ht.type_name, ht.category, ht.evaluation_dimension FROM student_honor_application a LEFT JOIN honor_types ht ON a.honor_type_id = ht.id WHERE a.student_id = #{studentId} AND a.period_id = #{periodId} AND a.status = 5 -- 学校审核通过 AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.honor_name, a.honor_level, a.bonus_score, ht.type_name, ht.category FROM student_honor_application a LEFT JOIN honor_types ht ON a.honor_type_id = ht.id WHERE a.student_id = #{studentId} AND a.period_id = #{periodId} AND a.affect_dimension = #{dimension} AND a.status = 5 -- 学校审核通过 AND a.deleted = 0
